title: Camila Rojas’s CV
text:
Computer Science Student, BYUI Student

roj25001@byui.edu | LinkedIn Profile



Studying Computer Science at Brigham Young University - Idaho and working as an Economics Teaching Assistant and Morning Custodian.


Python, C#, JavaScript, HTML/CSS, Polars library, SQL, data analysis, microeconomics



Applied data science, economic modeling, machine learning, platform economics, algorithm design.




2025 - Present Brigham Young University - Idaho

B.S. in Computer Science (Sophomore)




2026 Society of Women Engineers (SWE)

Programmed an interactive adventure game for custom microcontroller hardware badges (ESP32) featuring on-screen UI navigation and device networking features.

2025 - Present Computing Society

Attended weekly talks, industry presentations, and informative lectures on software development and computer science concepts.

2025 Tech-Ready Society

Attended presentations and workshops focused on internship preparation, career strategies, and guidance for securing top tech roles.



2026 - Present Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Economics Teaching Assistant
Supporting students in microeconomic concepts, market structures, and problem-solving.

2025 - 2026 Brigham Young University - Idaho, Rexburg, ID

Morning Custodian
Managed campus facility maintenance and ensured operational cleanliness with reliability and consistency.
